_comment: JSON-LD Schema Markup for Agent Forge — Copy-paste into page <head> tags

homepage.name: Agent Forge
homepage.description: No-code AI agent builder with voice, phone, and multi-channel capabilities. Build and deploy AI agents in 60 seconds without writing code.

offers.name: Starter
offers.description: 1 AI agent, 1,000 conversations/month, 100 voice minutes, 1 phone number, basic analytics

offers.name: Professional
offers.description: 5 AI agents, 10,000 conversations/month, 500 voice minutes, 5 phone numbers, advanced analytics, API access, batch calling

offers.name: Enterprise
offers.description: Unlimited AI agents and conversations, 2,000 voice minutes, unlimited phone numbers, white-label, on-premise, custom TTS

featureList: Multi-channel deployment (web, WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, SMS, phone, email)

pricing_page.name: Agent Forge Pricing
pricing_page.description: Agent Forge pricing plans: Starter ($79/mo), Professional ($249/mo), Enterprise ($799/mo). All plans include voice minutes and phone numbers. 14-day free trial.

itemListElement.name: Starter Plan
itemListElement.description: $79/month — 1 AI agent, 1,000 conversations, 100 voice minutes, 1 phone number

itemListElement.name: Professional Plan
itemListElement.description: $249/month — 5 AI agents, 10,000 conversations, 500 voice minutes, 5 phone numbers, API access

itemListElement.name: Enterprise Plan
itemListElement.description: $799/month — Unlimited agents and conversations, 2,000 voice minutes, unlimited phone numbers, white-label

acceptedAnswer.text: Agent Forge is a no-code AI agent builder that lets businesses create, deploy, and manage voice and text AI agents without writing code. Plans start at $79/month with a 14-day free trial.

mainEntity.name: Can Agent Forge make phone calls?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Agent Forge has native voice capabilities including inbound and outbound phone calls. Every plan includes dedicated phone numbers and voice minutes.

mainEntity.name: How much does Agent Forge cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Agent Forge offers three plans: Starter at $79/month, Professional at $249/month, and Enterprise at $799/month. All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.
Yes. Professional plans include custom branding, and Enterprise plans offer full white-label capabilities including your own domain and client workspaces.

mainEntity.name: What channels does Agent Forge support?

acceptedAnswer.text: Agent Forge supports website chat, WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, SMS, email, and phone (inbound and outbound). All channels work from a single agent configuration.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to set up Agent Forge?

acceptedAnswer.text: The average user goes from signup to deployed agent in under 60 seconds. No onboarding calls, tutorials, or technical skills required.
Yes. Agent Forge is SOC 2 compliant with end-to-end encryption. Enterprise customers get additional security features including on-premise deployment.
TTS voice cloning is an Enterprise feature that lets you create a custom AI voice matching your brand. Provide audio samples and Agent Forge generates a synthetic voice for your agents.

comparison_pages.name: Agent Forge vs Competitors
comparison_pages.description: Compare Agent Forge with Botpress, Voiceflow, Vapi, Bland AI, and other AI agent builders.

organization.name: Agent Forge
organization.description: No-code AI agent builder with voice, phone, and multi-channel capabilities.
